mechanism: For countries with >30% food CPI weight, currency depreciation raises food import costs, generating inflation that prevents central bank easing, maintaining carry attractiveness while fundamentals deteriorate. This agricultural channel feeds into the 5-signal crisis archetype as an accelerant, though it does not supersede rate differentials as a primary driver.
regime_dependence: Active only in countries with >30% food CPI weight and import-dependent food supply. Biological supply replacement timeline of 6-18 months creates an irreducible physical constraint. Dollar invoicing pass-through is asymmetric (0.15-0.40 for EM vs. 0.03-0.08 for DM).
